final:
module top_module(
    input clk, reset, enable,
    output reg [3:0] q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(reset) begin
        q <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else if(enable) begin
        q <= q + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
